The product helps students see patterns in their own interests/activities and expand career/education awareness, without telling them what to do.\n\nThis plan follows the phased roadmap from the PDR (12 months → 4 phases) but executes them sequentially as code deliverables.\n\n---\n\n## Tech Stack (Locked)\n| Layer | Choice |\n|---|---|\n| Monorepo | Turborepo + pnpm |\n| Web + Dashboard | Next.js 14 (App Router) |\n| Mobile | Expo (React Native) |\n| Styling | Tailwind CSS + custom glass tokens |\n| Animation | Framer Motion (web) / Reanimated (mobile) |\n| Auth | Clerk |\n| Database | Supabase (PostgreSQL + pgvector) |\n| ORM | Prisma |\n| AI | Anthropic Claude API (haiku for cheap, sonnet for synthesis) |\n| Embeddings | Voyage AI (`voyage-3`) |\n| AI Service | Python FastAPI on Railway |\n| Queue | Upstash QStash (serverless-safe) |\n| Cache | Upstash Redis |\n| Push Notifications | Expo Push Notifications |\n| Map Viz | D3.js |\n| Hosting | Vercel (web) + Railway (AI service) |\n\n---\n\n## Monorepo Structure\n```\ncompass/\n├── apps/\n│   ├── web/              # Next.js — student web app + counselor dashboard\n│   ├── mobile/           # Expo — iOS/Android\n│   └── ai-service/       # Python FastAPI — signal mining, prompts, synthesis\n├── packages/\n│   ├── db/               # Prisma schema + client\n│   ├── types/            # Shared TypeScript types\n│   ├── ui/               # Shared React components (glass design system)\n│   └── config/           # Shared tsconfig, tailwind, eslint\n├── turbo.json\n├── pnpm-workspace.yaml\n└── package.json\n```\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Phases\n\n### PHASE 1 — Project Foundation (Steps 1–4)\n\n#### Step 1: Monorepo Scaffold\n**Files to create:**\n- `package.json` (root) — workspace config, turbo scripts\n- `pnpm-workspace.yaml` — workspace globs\n- `turbo.json` — pipeline: build, dev, lint, test\n- `.env.example` — all required env vars documented\n- `.gitignore`\n- `packages/config/tsconfig.base.json`\n- `packages/config/tailwind.config.ts` — glass design tokens\n- `packages/config/eslint.config.js`\n\n**Key design tokens (Tailwind):**\n```js\n// Glass OS design system\ncolors: {\n  'glass-white': 'rgba(255,255,255,0.72)',\n  'bg-primary': '#F2F4F7',\n  'accent-primary': '#3B82F6',\n  'signal-strong': '#10B981',\n  'signal-moderate': '#F59E0B',\n  'signal-emerging': '#8B5CF6',\n  'text-primary': '#1A1A2E',\n}\n// backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(180%)\n// border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18)\n```\n\n#### Step 2: Packages Setup\n**`packages/types/src/`** — TypeScript interfaces:\n- `student.ts` — Student, Counselor, School\n- `session.ts` — ReflectionSession, Activity, Reflection\n- `signals.ts` — SignalProfile, InterestCluster, CharacterSignal, TrajectoryShift\n- `map.ts` — MapNode, MapEdge, PersonalizedMapData\n- `notifications.ts` — Notification, NotificationPreferences\n- `index.ts` — barrel export\n\n**`packages/ui/src/`** — Shared components:\n- `GlassCard.tsx` — primary container with glassmorphism\n- `GlassPanel.tsx` — lighter glass variant\n- `SignalBadge.tsx` — interest tag with colored dot\n- `Button.tsx` — variants: primary, ghost, glass\n- `PrivacyToggle.tsx` — gray/blue dot toggle\n- `animations.ts` — Framer Motion variants (staggerContainer, fadeUpVariant, scaleIn)\n- `index.ts` — barrel export\n\n**`packages/db/`:**\n- `prisma/schema.prisma` — full data model (see Step 3)\n- `src/index.ts` — Prisma client singleton\n- `src/seed.ts` — map node seeding script\n\n#### Step 3: Database Schema (Critical Path)\n**`packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma`** — full schema:\n\n```prisma\ngenerator client {\n  provider        = \"prisma-client-js\"\n  previewFeatures = [\"postgresqlExtensions\"]\n}\n\ndatasource db {\n  provider   = \"postgresql\"\n  url        = env(\"DATABASE_URL\")\n  directUrl  = env(\"DIRECT_URL\")\n  extensions = [pgvector(map: \"vector\")]\n}\n\nenum Role { STUDENT COUNSELOR ADMIN }\nenum ActivityCategory { ACADEMIC EXTRACURRICULAR READING PROJECT WORK VOLUNTEER HOBBY }\nenum PromptType { PATTERN EXPLORATION IDENTITY CHALLENGE }\nenum NotificationType { REFLECTION_NUDGE OPPORTUNITY MAP_EXPANSION PEER_PROMPT }\nenum MapNodeType { CAREER MAJOR INDUSTRY PROGRAM SKILL VALUE }\nenum EdgeType { REQUIRES LEADS_TO RELATED ALTERNATIVE }\n\nmodel Student {\n  id                    String   @id @default(cuid())\n  clerkId               String   @unique\n  email                 String   @unique\n  firstName             String\n  lastName              String\n  gradeLevel            Int?     // 9-12\n  schoolId              String?\n  onboardingCompleted   Boolean  @default(false)\n  createdAt             DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt             DateTime @updatedAt\n  school                School?  @relation(fields: [schoolId], references: [id])\n  sessions              ReflectionSession[]\n  activities            Activity[]\n  reflections           Reflection[]\n  signalProfiles        SignalProfile[]\n  notifications         Notification[]\n  notificationPrefs     NotificationPreferences?\n  privacySettings       StudentPrivacySettings?\n  peerMemberships       PeerGroupMember[]\n}\n\nmodel Counselor {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  clerkId   String   @unique\n  email     String   @unique\n  firstName String\n  lastName  String\n  schoolId  String\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  school    School   @relation(fields: [schoolId], references: [id])\n}\n\nmodel School {\n  id             String    @id @default(cuid())\n  name           String\n  district       String?\n  state          String?\n  tier           String    @default(\"free\") // free | licensed\n  licenseExpires DateTime?\n  createdAt      DateTime  @default(now())\n  students       Student[]\n  counselors     Counselor[]\n}\n\nmodel ReflectionSession {\n  id              String    @id @default(cuid())\n  studentId       String\n  monthKey        String    // \"2025-03\" format for uniqueness\n  pulseScore      Int?      // 1-10\n  pulseNote       String?\n  completedAt     DateTime?\n  durationSeconds Int?\n  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())\n  student         Student   @relation(fields: [studentId], references: [id])\n  activities      Activity[]\n  reflections     Reflection[]\n  @@unique([studentId, monthKey])\n}\n\nmodel Activity {\n  id            String           @id @default(cuid())\n  studentId     String\n  sessionId     String?\n  category      ActivityCategory\n  name          String\n  description   String?\n  hoursPerWeek  Decimal?\n  excitement    Int?             // 1-5\n  isOngoing     Boolean          @default(true)\n  startDate     DateTime?\n  endDate       DateTime?\n  createdAt     DateTime         @default(now())\n  student       Student          @relation(fields: [studentId], references: [id])\n  session       ReflectionSession? @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id])\n}\n\nmodel Reflection {\n  id                    String    @id @default(cuid())\n  studentId             String\n  sessionId             String\n  promptText            String\n  responseText          String?\n  promptType            PromptType\n  isSharedWithCounselor Boolean   @default(false)\n  wordCount             Int?\n  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())\n  student               Student   @relation(fields: [studentId], references: [id])\n  session               ReflectionSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id])\n}\n\nmodel SignalProfile {\n  id                String   @id @default(cuid())\n  studentId         String\n  interestClusters  Json     @default(\"[]\")\n  characterSignals  Json     @default(\"[]\")\n  trajectoryShifts  Json     @default(\"[]\")\n  gapDetection      Json     @default(\"{}\")\n  breadthScore      Float    @default(0)\n  compressedSummary String?\n  lastSynthesizedAt DateTime?\n  synthesisVersion  Int      @default(1)\n  createdAt         DateTime @default(now())\n  student           Student  @relation(fields: [studentId], references: [id])\n}\n\nmodel StudentPrivacySettings {\n  studentId              String  @id\n  shareInterestClusters  Boolean @default(true)\n  shareBreadthScore      Boolean @default(true)\n  shareTrajectoryShifts  Boolean @default(true)\n  shareCharacterSignals  Boolean @default(true)\n  updatedAt              DateTime @updatedAt\n  student                Student @relation(fields: [studentId], references: [id])\n}\n\nmodel MapNode {\n  id          String      @id @default(cuid())\n  type        MapNodeType\n  label       String\n  description String?\n  metadata    Json        @default(\"{}\")\n  parentId    String?\n  embedding   Unsupported(\"vector(1024)\")?\n  createdAt   DateTime    @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime    @updatedAt\n  parent      MapNode?    @relation(\"MapHierarchy\", fields: [parentId], references: [id])\n  children    MapNode[]   @relation(\"MapHierarchy\")\n  outEdges    MapEdge[]   @relation(\"MapEdgeSource\")\n  inEdges     MapEdge[]   @relation(\"MapEdgeTarget\")\n  notifications Notification[]\n}\n\nmodel MapEdge {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  sourceId   String\n  targetId   String\n  weight     Float    @default(0.5)\n  edgeType   EdgeType @default(RELATED)\n  source     MapNode  @relation(\"MapEdgeSource\", fields: [sourceId], references: [id])\n  target     MapNode  @relation(\"MapEdgeTarget\", fields: [targetId], references: [id])\n}\n\nmodel Notification {\n  id               String           @id @default(cuid())\n  studentId        String\n  type             NotificationType\n  title            String\n  body             String\n  relatedNodeId    String?\n  deliveredAt      DateTime?\n  readAt           DateTime?\n  actedOn          Boolean          @default(false)\n  createdAt        DateTime         @default(now())\n  student          Student          @relation(fields: [studentId], references: [id])\n  relatedNode      MapNode?         @relation(fields: [relatedNodeId], references: [id])\n}\n\nmodel NotificationPreferences {\n  studentId         String  @id\n  maxPerWeek        Int     @default(3)\n  reflectionNudges  Boolean @default(true)\n  opportunityAlerts Boolean @default(true)\n  mapExpansions     Boolean @default(true)\n  peerPrompts       Boolean @default(true)\n  quietHoursStart   String  @default(\"21:00\")\n  quietHoursEnd     String  @default(\"08:00\")\n  student           Student @relation(fields: [studentId], references: [id])\n}\n\nmodel PeerGroup {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  name      String?\n  active    Boolean  @default(true)\n  formedAt  DateTime @default(now())\n  members   PeerGroupMember[]\n}\n\nmodel PeerGroupMember {\n  groupId     String\n  studentId   String\n  displayName String\n  joinedAt    DateTime @default(now())\n  group       PeerGroup @relation(fields: [groupId], references: [id])\n  student     Student   @relation(fields: [studentId], references: [id])\n  @@id([groupId, studentId])\n}\n```\n\n#### Step 4: Auth Layer\n**`apps/web/`:**\n- `middleware.ts` — Clerk `authMiddleware`, protect all routes except `/sign-in`, `/sign-up`, `/api/webhooks/*`\n- `app/api/webhooks/clerk/route.ts` — sync user → Student or Counselor in Postgres based on `publicMetadata.role`\n- `lib/auth.ts` — `requireStudent()` and `requireCounselor()` helpers that return DB record from Clerk userId\n\n---\n\n### PHASE 2 — Core API (Steps 5–8)\n\n#### Step 5: Session & Reflection API\n**`apps/web/app/api/`:**\n\n```\nsessions/\n  route.ts          POST: create session for current month (unique on studentId+monthKey)\n                    GET: list all sessions\n  [id]/\n    route.ts        GET: session detail with activities + reflections\n    submit/\n      route.ts      POST: mark complete, enqueue QStash synthesis job\nactivities/\n  route.ts          POST: add activity\n  [id]/\n    route.ts        PUT: update, DELETE: remove\nreflections/\n  route.ts          POST: save reflection response\n  [id]/\n    route.ts        PATCH: update isSharedWithCounselor\n```\n\n#### Step 6: Privacy & Student Profile API\n```\nprivacy/\n  route.ts          GET: current settings, PUT: update settings\n  audit/route.ts    GET: sharing history\n  reset/route.ts    POST: make everything private\nstudents/\n  profile/route.ts  GET: own profile, PUT: update\n  signal-profile/route.ts GET: latest signal profile\n  onboarding/route.ts POST: save onboarding data\nexport/\n  route.ts          GET: full data export JSON\n  delete/route.ts   DELETE: GDPR deletion\n```\n\n#### Step 7: Map API\n```\nmap/\n  nodes/route.ts           GET: all nodes (filterable by type)\n  nodes/[id]/route.ts      GET: node detail + connected edges\n  personalized/route.ts    GET: nodes ranked by similarity to student's signal embedding\n  search/route.ts          GET: ?q= text search\n```\n\n**Personalized map query (key algorithm):**\n1. Fetch student's `compressedSummary` from `SignalProfile`\n2. Call Voyage AI to get embedding of the summary\n3. Run pgvector similarity search: `ORDER BY embedding <-> $1 LIMIT 50`\n4. Return nodes with injected `similarity` score\n5. Cache result in Upstash Redis for 1 hour\n\n#### Step 8: Counselor & Notification API\n```\ncounselor/\n  students/route.ts              GET: assigned students list with breadth scores\n  students/[id]/summary/route.ts GET: privacy-filtered synthesized view\n  students/[id]/meeting-prep/route.ts GET: AI-generated meeting prep (cached 24h)\n  flags/route.ts                 GET: disengaged/narrow students\n\nnotifications/\n  route.ts                       GET: paginated list\n  [id]/read/route.ts             PUT: mark read\n  [id]/acted/route.ts            PUT: mark acted on\n  preferences/route.ts           GET/PUT: notification settings\n```\n\n---\n\n### PHASE 3 — AI Service (Steps 9–11)\n\n#### Step 9: FastAPI App Structure\n**`apps/ai-service/`:**\n```\napp/\n  main.py               FastAPI app, CORS, auth middleware (verify AI_SERVICE_SECRET_KEY header)\n  routers/\n    reflection.py       POST /reflection-prompts\n    synthesis.py        POST /synthesize-profile\n    notifications.py    POST /generate-notification\n    counselor.py        POST /meeting-prep\n  services/\n    rag_service.py      Compressed profile retrieval, vector search\n    embedding_service.py Voyage AI embeddings\n  prompts/\n    reflection.py       Reflection prompt generation templates\n    synthesis.py        Signal synthesis templates\n    notifications.py    Notification generation templates\n    counselor.py        Meeting prep templates\n  models/\n    requests.py         Pydantic request/response models\n  config.py             Settings from env vars\nrequirements.txt\nDockerfile\nrailway.toml\n```\n\n#### Step 10: AI Prompt Implementations\n\n**Reflection prompts (`/reflection-prompts`):**\n- Input: studentId → fetch compressedSummary + recent 30-day activities + last 2 sessions' reflections + previously asked prompts\n- Model: `claude-haiku-4-5` (cheap, structured output)\n- Output: `[{ promptText, promptType }]` (2-3 questions)\n- Rules: never prescribe direction, connect cross-domain interests, expand awareness, no repeats, <30 words each\n\n**Signal synthesis (`/synthesize-profile`):**\n- Input: studentId → fetch FULL activity + reflection history + previous profile\n- Model: `claude-sonnet-4-6` (deep analysis)\n- Output: full SignalProfile JSON (interestClusters, characterSignals, trajectoryShifts, gapDetection, breadthScore, compressedSummary)\n- Rules: evidence-based, frame as \"emerging\" never fixed, note non-obvious connections\n\n**Notification generation (`/generate-notification`):**\n- Input: studentId + trigger_type + trigger_data → fetch compressedSummary\n- Model: `claude-haiku-4-5`\n- Output: `{ title (≤8 words), body (≤50 words) }`\n- Rules: specific not generic, never urgency/FOMO, personalized to trajectory\n\n**Meeting prep (`/meeting-prep`):**\n- Input: studentId + counselorId → fetch ONLY privacy-shared data\n- Model: `claude-haiku-4-5`\n- Output: ≤300 word summary with 2-3 conversation starters and flags\n- Rules: synthesized not raw, professional+warm tone\n\n#### Step 11: Embedding Pipeline\n- On `Activity` create: generate Voyage AI embedding → store in `map_nodes`-parallel index\n- On `SignalProfile` update: generate embedding of `compressedSummary` → store for map personalization\n- Use `voyage-3` model (1024-dim vectors)\n- Batch embed on first synthesis; incremental thereafter\n\n---\n\n### PHASE 4 — Student Web App (Steps 12–15)\n\n#### Step 12: App Shell & Routing\n**`apps/web/app/`:**\n```\n(auth)/\n  sign-in/page.tsx          Clerk SignIn component\n  sign-up/page.tsx          Clerk SignUp component\n(student)/\n  layout.tsx                BottomNav (Home/Map/Reflections/Profile)\n  page.tsx                  Home dashboard\n  reflect/\n    page.tsx                Start/continue session CTA\n    [sessionId]/\n      page.tsx              5-step session wizard\n      complete/page.tsx     Completion screen\n  map/page.tsx              Interactive D3 map\n  reflections/page.tsx      History timeline\n  profile/page.tsx          Signal profile + privacy + settings\n  onboarding/page.tsx       First-time onboarding wizard\n(counselor)/\n  layout.tsx                Sidebar nav\n  dashboard/page.tsx        Student grid overview\n  students/[id]/page.tsx    Student detail + meeting prep\n  flags/page.tsx            Students needing attention\n```\n\n#### Step 13: Home Dashboard\n**`app/(student)/page.tsx`** — glass cards showing:\n- Current signal profile summary (top 3-5 interest clusters with trend indicators)\n- Next session countdown (\"Your monthly reflection opens in X days\")\n- Recent notifications (last 2)\n- Exploration breadth score bar\n- Map moment CTA (\"3 new areas match your profile\")\n\nComponents:\n- `SignalSummary.tsx` — interest clusters with signal strength indicators\n- `BreadthBar.tsx` — animated progress bar 0-100\n- `SessionCountdown.tsx` — days to next monthly session\n- `NotificationPreview.tsx` — 2-card notification strip\n\n#### Step 14: Monthly Reflection Session Wizard\n**`app/(student)/reflect/[sessionId]/page.tsx`** — 5-step wizard:\n\n**Step 1 — Pulse Check:**\n- 1-10 energy slider (not a mood tracker — context setter)\n- Optional free text: \"What's on your mind?\"\n- Large, comfortable input, no judgment framing\n\n**Step 2 — Activity Logger:**\n- List existing activities (ongoing)\n- \"Add Activity\" form: name, category selector, excitement rating (1-5 stars), hours/week\n- Smart suggestions based on prior entries\n- \"Continue to Reflection\" CTA\n\n**Step 3 — AI Reflection Prompts:**\n- Fetch prompts from `/api/ai/reflection-prompts` (calls AI service)\n- Display 2-3 questions one at a time or stacked\n- Large textarea per question, auto-save every 10 seconds\n- Word count indicator\n- No character limit\n\n**Step 4 — Map Moment:**\n- Show 1-2 \"did you know?\" map expansions based on this session's activities\n- Cards showing a career/major/opportunity adjacent to their signals\n- \"Add to my map\" bookmarking\n- Optional \"skip\" if student just wants to submit\n\n**Step 5 — Privacy Review:**\n- Checklist of signal data categories (toggles default ON)\n- Per-reflection sharing (default OFF)\n- \"What your counselor will see\" live preview\n- \"Submit Reflection\" CTA\n- Triggers `/api/sessions/[id]/submit`\n\n#### Step 15: The Map (D3.js)\n**`app/(student)/map/page.tsx`** + **`components/map/MapCanvas.tsx`:**\n\n```\nMapCanvas.tsx\n├── D3ForceGraph (nodes as circles, edges as lines)\n├── Node rendering:\n│   ├── Size = relevance to student (similarity score)\n│   ├── Glow effect = personalized (CSS radial-gradient)\n│   ├── Color = node type (career=blue, major=purple, industry=green, program=amber)\n│   └── Pulse animation = newly relevant nodes\n├── MapNodeDetail.tsx (glass panel on node click)\n├── MapSearchBar.tsx (text search, filters by type)\n├── MapLegend.tsx (type color key)\n└── PersonalizationToggle.tsx (show all vs. personalized view)\n```\n\nD3 force simulation: charge repulsion, link distance by edge weight, center gravity. Pinch-to-zoom, drag-to-pan. Mobile: touch-friendly with larger tap targets.\n\n---\n\n### PHASE 5 — Counselor Dashboard (Step 16)\n\n#### Step 16: Counselor Views\n**`app/(counselor)/dashboard/page.tsx`:**\n- Student grid: name, grade, top 2 interests, breadth score bar, engagement indicator (dot: green/amber/red)\n- Sort by: breadth, engagement, grade, last active\n- Filter by: interest area, engagement level\n- \"Needs attention\" flag indicators\n\n**`app/(counselor)/students/[id]/page.tsx`:**\n- Synthesized interest profile (never raw text)\n- Trajectory visualization (shift arrows)\n- Suggested conversation starters (AI-generated)\n- Engagement timeline\n- \"Send Reflection Prompt\" — counselor can send a custom prompt to student\n- Meeting prep PDF/print view\n\n---\n\n### PHASE 6 — Notification System (Step 17)\n\n#### Step 17: QStash Scheduling Engine\n**`apps/web/app/api/webhooks/qstash/route.ts`** — receives jobs:\n\n**Job types:**\n- `WEEKLY_NUDGE_SWEEP` — runs every Monday 9am\n  - For each active student: check days since last reflection, generate nudge if eligible\n  - Respect: maxPerWeek cap, 48hr minimum interval, quiet hours, cooldown after session (72hr)\n- `OPPORTUNITY_SWEEP` — runs nightly\n  - Match upcoming opportunities (deadlines within 3 weeks) against student signal embeddings\n- `POST_SESSION_SYNTHESIS` — triggered on session submit\n  - Call AI service `/synthesize-profile`\n  - Update SignalProfile in DB\n  - Invalidate Redis caches\n\n**Scheduling:** Register QStash cron jobs on deploy via `scripts/register-crons.ts`\n\n**Notification delivery:**\n- Web: store in `notifications` table → poll on home page\n- Mobile (Phase 2): Expo Push Notifications via `expo-server-sdk`\n\n---\n\n### PHASE 7 — Mobile App (Step 18)\n\n#### Step 18: Expo App\n**`apps/mobile/`:**\n```\napp/\n  (tabs)/\n    index.tsx         Home (mirrors web home)\n    map.tsx           Simplified map (WebView of web map or native D3)\n    reflections.tsx   Session history\n    profile.tsx       Signal profile + settings\n  reflect/\n    [sessionId].tsx   Full 5-step session (native UI)\n  onboarding.tsx      First launch flow\ncomponents/\n  GlassCard.tsx       Native glass (BlurView)\n  SignalBadge.tsx\n  ActivityCard.tsx\n  NotificationCard.tsx\nlib/\n  api.ts              API client pointing to Vercel URL\n  notifications.ts    Expo push notification registration\n```\n\nKey mobile differences:\n- `expo-blur` for glass effect (iOS) / fallback for Android\n- `expo-notifications` for push registration + handling\n- Bottom tab navigator (4 tabs)\n- Haptic feedback on key interactions (`expo-haptics`)\n\n---\n\n### PHASE 8 — Data Seeding (Step 19)\n\n#### Step 19: Map Data Population\n**`packages/db/src/seed.ts`** — seed script with initial map data:\n\nCareer families (13 total from PDR): Technology, Finance, Consulting, Healthcare, Engineering, Law, Education, Media, Government/Policy, Science/Research, Arts/Design, Entrepreneurship, Nonprofit\n\nPer family: 5-15 specific career nodes with:\n- `metadata.medianSalary`, `metadata.growthRate`\n- `metadata.educationRequired`\n- `metadata.skills[]`, `metadata.entryPaths[]`\n- `metadata.dayInTheLife`\n\nEducation nodes: top 100 US universities' notable programs, double-major combinations, distinctive programs (UVA Systems Engineering, Stanford Symbolic Systems, etc.)\n\nOpportunity nodes: national competitions by field, summer programs, online courses, research opportunities\n\nAfter seeding: run Voyage AI embedding batch job on all map nodes (`scripts/embed-map-nodes.ts`)\n\n---\n\n### PHASE 9 — Testing & Deployment (Step 20)\n\n#### Step 20: Deployment Setup\n**Vercel (web):**\n- Root dir: `apps/web`\n- Build: `turbo build --filter=web`\n- All env vars set in dashboard\n- Clerk webhook → `/api/webhooks/clerk`\n- QStash registered crons\n\n**Railway (ai-service):**\n- Dockerfile deploy\n- Health endpoint: `GET /health`\n- Auto-deploy on push to `main`\n\n**Vercel env vars required:**\n```\nDATABASE_URL, DIRECT_URL\nNEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, CLERK_SECRET_KEY, CLERK_WEBHOOK_SECRET\nAI_SERVICE_URL, AI_SERVICE_SECRET_KEY\nQSTASH_TOKEN, QSTASH_CURRENT_SIGNING_KEY, QSTASH_NEXT_SIGNING_KEY\nUPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL, UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN\nNEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL\n```\n\n**Railway env vars required:**\n```\nANTHROPIC_API_KEY\nDATABASE_URL (non-pooled Supabase URL)\nVOYAGE_API_KEY\nAI_SERVICE_SECRET_KEY\n```\n\n---\n\n## Build Order (Critical Path)\n\n```\nWeek 1:  Step 1-2   → Monorepo scaffold + packages (types, ui, config, db)\nWeek 2:  Step 3     → Database schema → Supabase setup → migrations\nWeek 3:  Step 4     → Auth (Clerk) → webhook → user sync\nWeek 4:  Step 5-6   → Session, reflection, privacy, student profile APIs\nWeek 5:  Step 7-8   → Map API + Counselor API\nWeek 6:  Step 9-10  → AI Service (FastAPI) → all 4 prompt implementations\nWeek 7:  Step 11    → Embedding pipeline (Voyage AI + pgvector)\nWeek 8:  Step 12-13 → Web app shell + Home dashboard\nWeek 9:  Step 14    → Monthly reflection session wizard (core UX)\nWeek 10: Step 15    → The Map (D3.js)\nWeek 11: Step 16    → Counselor dashboard\nWeek 12: Step 17    → Notification system (QStash)\nWeek 13: Step 18    → Mobile app (Expo)\nWeek 14: Step 19    → Map data seeding + embedding batch\nWeek 15: Step 20    → Deployment (Vercel + Railway + Expo)\n```\n\n---\n\n## Key Architectural Decisions\n\n**Why QStash over Bull:** Vercel serverless has no persistent process. QStash delivers jobs as HTTP POST callbacks — the only viable pattern.\n\n**Why compressed profiles:** Full student history = 10k+ tokens at 5 sessions. Monthly synthesis (claude-sonnet, expensive, once/month) compresses to 400-word summary. All other calls use only that summary (claude-haiku, cheap).\n\n**Why RLS + API-layer privacy:** RLS in Supabase is the security guarantee. API filtering is the UX feature. Both needed.\n\n**Why Voyage AI:** Anthropic has no standalone embedding API. Voyage AI (Anthropic partner) provides `voyage-3` (1024-dim, optimized for semantic similarity).\n\n---\n\n## Verification Plan\n1. Auth flow: Sign up as student → Clerk webhook → Student row in Supabase ✓\n2. Session flow: Create session → add activities → get AI prompts → submit → QStash job → SignalProfile updated ✓\n3. Privacy: Counselor sees only opted-in items; raw reflections hidden by default ✓\n4. Map: Personalized query returns nodes ranked by vector similarity ✓\n5. Notifications: Weekly sweep respects frequency caps, quiet hours, 72hr post-session cooldown ✓\n6. Counselor dashboard: Shows synthesized (not raw) data, filtered by privacy settings ✓\n\n\nIf you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: /Users/yahelraviv/.claude/projects/-Users-yahelraviv/ac8ae0bf-9ff5-46cc-a2bd-43f182754166.jsonl"},"uuid":"9d3c2a46-b40b-400a-be90-37cf0d5dcc94","timestamp":"2026-03-01T20:59:19.069Z","planContent":"# COMPASS — Full Implementation Plan\n\n## Context\nBuild the entire COMPASS application from scratch — a longitudinal student operating system for high school self-authorship. The product helps students see patterns in their own interests/activities and expand career/education awareness, without telling them what to do.\n\nThis plan follows the phased roadmap from the PDR (12 months → 4 phases) but executes them sequentially as code deliverables.\n\n---\n\n## Tech Stack (Locked)\n| Layer | Choice |\n|---|---|\n| Monorepo | Turborepo + pnpm |\n| Web + Dashboard | Next.js 14 (App Router) |\n| Mobile | Expo (React Native) |\n| Styling | Tailwind CSS + custom glass tokens |\n| Animation | Framer Motion (web) / Reanimated (mobile) |\n| Auth | Clerk |\n| Database | Supabase (PostgreSQL + pgvector) |\n| ORM | Prisma |\n| AI | Anthropic Claude API (haiku for cheap, sonnet for synthesis) |\n| Embeddings | Voyage AI (`voyage-3`) |\n| AI Service | Python FastAPI on Railway |\n| Queue | Upstash QStash (serverless-safe) |\n| Cache | Upstash Redis |\n| Push Notifications | Expo Push Notifications |\n| Map Viz | D3.js |\n| Hosting | Vercel (web) + Railway (AI service) |\n\n---\n\n## Monorepo Structure\n```\ncompass/\n├── apps/\n│   ├── web/              # Next.js — student web app + counselor dashboard\n│   ├── mobile/           # Expo — iOS/Android\n│   └── ai-service/       # Python FastAPI — signal mining, prompts, synthesis\n├── packages/\n│   ├── db/               # Prisma schema + client\n│   ├── types/            # Shared TypeScript types\n│   ├── ui/               # Shared React components (glass design system)\n│   └── config/           # Shared tsconfig, tailwind, eslint\n├── turbo.json\n├── pnpm-workspace.yaml\n└── package.json\n```\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Phases\n\n### PHASE 1 — Project Foundation (Steps 1–4)\n\n#### Step 1: Monorepo Scaffold\n**Files to create:**\n- `package.json` (root) — workspace colored dot\n- `Button.tsx` — variants: primary, ghost, glass\n- `PrivacyToggle.tsx` — gray/blue dot toggle\n- `animations.ts` — Framer Motion variants (staggerContainer, fadeUpVariant, scaleIn)\n- script\n\n#### Step 3: Database Schema (Critical Path)\n**`packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma`** — full schema:\n\n```prisma\ngenerator client {\n  provider        = \"prisma-client-js\"\n  previewFeatures = [\"postgresqlExtensions\"]\n}\n\ndatasource db {\n  provider   = \"postgresql\"\n  url        = env(\"DATABASE_URL\")\n  directUrl  = env(\"DIRECT_URL\")\n  extensions = [pgvector(map: \"vector\")]\n}\n\nenum Role { STUDENT COUNSELOR ADMIN }\nenum ActivityCategory { ACADEMIC EXTRACURRICULAR READING PROJECT WORK VOLUNTEER HOBBY }\nenum PromptType { PATTERN EXPLORATION IDENTITY CHALLENGE }\nenum NotificationType { REFLECTION_NUDGE OPPORTUNITY MAP_EXPANSION PEER_PROMPT }\nenum MapNodeType { CAREER MAJOR INDUSTRY PROGRAM SKILL VALUE }\nenum EdgeType { REQUIRES LEADS_TO RELATED ALTERNATIVE }\n\nmodel Student {\n  id                    String   @id @default(cuid())\n  clerkId               String   @unique\n  email                 String   @unique\n  firstName             String\n  lastName              String\n  gradeLevel            Int?     // 9-12\n  schoolId              String?\n  onboardingCompleted   Boolean  @default(false)\n  createdAt             DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt             DateTime @updatedAt\n  school                School?  @relation(fields: [schoolId], references: [id])\n  sessions              ReflectionSession[]\n  activities            Activity[]\n  reflections           Reflection[]\n  signalProfiles        SignalProfile[]\n  notifications         Notification[]\n  notificationPrefs     NotificationPreferences?\n  privacySettings       StudentPrivacySettings?\n  peerMemberships       PeerGroupMember[]\n}\n\nmodel Counselor {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  clerkId   String   @unique\n  email     String   @unique\n  firstName String\n  lastName  String\n  schoolId  String\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  school    School   @relation(fields: [schoolId], references: [id])\n}\n\nmodel School {\n  id             String    @id @default(cuid())\n  name           String\n  district       String?\n  state          String?\n  tier           String    @default(\"free\") // free | licensed\n  licenseExpires DateTime?\n  createdAt      DateTime  @default(now())\n  students       Student[]\n  counselors     Counselor[]\n}\n\nmodel ReflectionSession {\n  id              String    @id @default(cuid())\n  studentId       String\n  monthKey        String    // \"2025-03\" format for uniqueness\n  pulseScore      Int?      // 1-10\n  pulseNote       String?\n  completedAt     DateTime?\n  durationSeconds Int?\n  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())\n  student         Student   @relation(fields: [studentId], references: [id])\n  activities      Activity[]\n  reflections     Reflection[]\n  @@unique([studentId, monthKey])\n}\n\nmodel Activity {\n  id            String           @id @default(cuid())\n  studentId     String\n  sessionId     String?\n  category      ActivityCategory\n  name          String\n  description   String?\n  hoursPerWeek  Decimal?\n  excitement    Int?             // 1-5\n  isOngoing     Boolean          @default(true)\n  startDate     DateTime?\n  endDate       DateTime?\n  createdAt     DateTime         @default(now())\n  student       Student          @relation(fields: [studentId], references: [id])\n  session       ReflectionSession? @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id])\n}\n\nmodel Reflection {\n  id                    String    @id @default(cuid())\n  studentId             String\n  sessionId             String\n  promptText            String\n  responseText          String?\n  promptType            PromptType\n  isSharedWithCounselor Boolean   @default(false)\n  wordCount             Int?\n  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())\n  student               Student   @relation(fields: [studentId], references: [id])\n  session               ReflectionSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id])\n}\n\nmodel SignalProfile {\n  id                String   @id @default(cuid())\n  studentId         String\n  interestClusters  Json     @default(\"[]\")\n  characterSignals  Json     @default(\"[]\")\n  trajectoryShifts  Json     @default(\"[]\")\n  gapDetection      Json     @default(\"{}\")\n  breadthScore      Float    @default(0)\n  compressedSummary String?\n  lastSynthesizedAt DateTime?\n  synthesisVersion  Int      @default(1)\n  createdAt         DateTime @default(now())\n  student           Student  @relation(fields: [studentId], references: [id])\n}\n\nmodel StudentPrivacySettings {\n  studentId              String  @id\n  shareInterestClusters  Boolean @default(true)\n  shareBreadthScore      Boolean @default(true)\n  shareTrajectoryShifts  Boolean @default(true)\n  shareCharacterSignals  Boolean @default(true)\n  updatedAt              DateTime @updatedAt\n  student                Student @relation(fields: [studentId], references: [id])\n}\n\nmodel MapNode {\n  id          String      @id @default(cuid())\n  type        MapNodeType\n  label       String\n  description String?\n  metadata    Json        @default(\"{}\")\n  parentId    String?\n  embedding   Unsupported(\"vector(1024)\")?\n  createdAt   DateTime    @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime    @updatedAt\n  parent      MapNode?    @relation(\"MapHierarchy\", fields: [parentId], references: [id])\n  children    MapNode[]   @relation(\"MapHierarchy\")\n  outEdges    MapEdge[]   @relation(\"MapEdgeSource\")\n  inEdges     MapEdge[]   @relation(\"MapEdgeTarget\")\n  notifications Notification[]\n}\n\nmodel MapEdge {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  sourceId   String\n  targetId   String\n  weight     Float    @default(0.5)\n  edgeType   EdgeType @default(RELATED)\n  source     MapNode  @relation(\"MapEdgeSource\", fields: [sourceId], references: [id])\n  target     MapNode  @relation(\"MapEdgeTarget\", fields: [targetId], references: [id])\n}\n\nmodel Notification {\n  id               String           @id @default(cuid())\n  studentId        String\n  type             NotificationType\n  title            String\n  body             String\n  relatedNodeId    String?\n  deliveredAt      DateTime?\n  readAt           DateTime?\n  actedOn          Boolean          @default(false)\n  createdAt        DateTime         @default(now())\n  student          Student          @relation(fields: [studentId], references: [id])\n  relatedNode      MapNode?         @relation(fields: [relatedNodeId], references: [id])\n}\n\nmodel NotificationPreferences {\n  studentId         String  @id\n  maxPerWeek        Int     @default(3)\n  reflectionNudges  Boolean @default(true)\n  opportunityAlerts Boolean @default(true)\n  mapExpansions     Boolean @default(true)\n  peerPrompts       Boolean @default(true)\n  quietHoursStart   String  @default(\"21:00\")\n  quietHoursEnd     String  @default(\"08:00\")\n  student           Student @relation(fields: [studentId], references: [id])\n}\n\nmodel PeerGroup {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  name      String?\n  active    Boolean  @default(true)\n  formedAt  DateTime @default(now())\n  members   PeerGroupMember[]\n}\n\nmodel PeerGroupMember {\n  groupId     String\n  studentId   String\n  displayName String\n  joinedAt    DateTime @default(now())\n  group       PeerGroup @relation(fields: [groupId], references: [id])\n  student     Student   @relation(fields: [studentId], references: [id])\n  @@id([groupId, studentId])\n}\n```\n\n#### Step 4: Auth Layer\n**`apps/web/`:**\n- `middleware.ts` — Clerk `authMiddleware`, protect all routes except `/sign-in`, `/sign-up`, `/api/webhooks/*`\n- `app/api/webhooks/clerk/route.ts` — sync user → Student or Counselor in Postgres based on `publicMetadata.role`\n- `lib/auth.ts` — `requireStudent()` and `requireCounselor()` helpers that return DB record from Clerk userId\n\n---\n\n### PHASE 2 — Core API (Steps 5–8)\n\n#### Step 5: Session & Reflection API\n**`apps/web/app/api/`:**\n\n```\nsessions/\n  route.ts          POST: create session for current month (unique on studentId+monthKey)\n                    GET: list all sessions\n  [id]/\n    route.ts        GET: session detail with activities + reflections\n    submit/\n      route.ts      POST: mark complete, enqueue QStash synthesis job\nactivities/\n  route.ts          POST: add activity\n  [id]/\n    route.ts        PUT: update, DELETE: remove\nreflections/\n  route.ts          POST: save reflection response\n  [id]/\n    route.ts        PATCH: update isSharedWithCounselor\n```\n\n#### Step 6: Privacy & Student Profile API\n```\nprivacy/\n  route.ts          GET: current settings, PUT: update settings\n  audit/route.ts    GET: sharing history\n  reset/route.ts    POST: make everything private\nstudents/\n  profile/route.ts  GET: own profile, PUT: update\n  signal-profile/route.ts GET: latest signal profile\n  onboarding/route.ts POST: save onboarding data\nexport/\n  route.ts          GET: full data export JSON\n  delete/route.ts   DELETE: GDPR deletion\n```\n\n#### Step 7: Map API\n```\nmap/\n  nodes/route.ts           GET: all nodes (filterable by type)\n  nodes/[id]/route.ts      GET: node detail + connected edges\n  personalized/route.ts    GET: nodes ranked by similarity to student's signal embedding\n  search/route.ts          GET: ?q= text search\n```\n\n**Personalized map query (key algorithm):**\n1. Fetch student's `compressedSummary` from `SignalProfile`\n2. Call Voyage AI to get embedding of the summary\n3. Run pgvector similarity search: `ORDER BY embedding <-> $1 LIMIT 50`\n4. Return nodes with injected `similarity` score\n5. Cache result in Upstash Redis for 1 hour\n\n#### Step 8: Counselor & Notification API\n```\ncounselor/\n  students/route.ts              GET: assigned students list with breadth scores\n  students/[id]/summary/route.ts GET: privacy-filtered synthesized view\n  students/[id]/meeting-prep/route.ts GET: AI-generated meeting prep (cached 24h)\n  flags/route.ts                 GET: disengaged/narrow students\n\nnotifications/\n  route.ts                       GET: paginated list\n  [id]/read/route.ts             PUT: mark read\n  [id]/acted/route.ts            PUT: mark acted on\n  preferences/route.ts           GET/PUT: notification settings\n```\n\n---\n\n### PHASE 3 — AI Service (Steps 9–11)\n\n#### Step 9: FastAPI App Structure\n**`apps/ai-service/`:**\n```\napp/\n  main.py               FastAPI app, CORS, auth middleware (verify AI_SERVICE_SECRET_KEY header)\n  routers/\n    reflection.py       POST /reflection-prompts\n    synthesis.py        POST /synthesize-profile\n    notifications.py    POST /generate-notification\n    counselor.py        POST /meeting-prep\n  services/\n    rag_service.py      Compressed profile retrieval, vector search\n    embedding_service.py Voyage AI embeddings\n  prompts/\n    reflection.py       Reflection prompt generation templates\n    synthesis.py        Signal synthesis templates\n    notifications.py    Notification generation templates\n    counselor.py        Meeting prep templates\n  models/\n    requests.py         Pydantic request/response models\n  config.py             Settings from env vars\nrequirements.txt\nDockerfile\nrailway.toml\n```\n\n#### Step 10: AI Prompt Implementations\n\n**Reflection prompts (`/reflection-prompts`):**\n- Input: studentId → fetch compressedSummary + recent 30-day activities + last 2 sessions' reflections + previously asked prompts\n- Model: `claude-haiku-4-5` (cheap, structured output)\n- Output: `[{ promptText, promptType }]` (2-3 questions)\n- Rules: never prescribe direction, connect cross-domain interests, expand awareness, no repeats, <30 words each\n\n**Signal synthesis (`/synthesize-profile`):**\n- Input: studentId → fetch FULL activity + reflection history + previous profile\n- Model: `claude-sonnet-4-6` (deep analysis)\n- Output: full SignalProfile JSON (interestClusters, characterSignals, trajectoryShifts, gapDetection, breadthScore, compressedSummary)\n- Rules: evidence-based, frame as \"emerging\" never fixed, note non-obvious connections\n\n**Notification generation (`/generate-notification`):**\n- Input: studentId + trigger_type + trigger_data → fetch compressedSummary\n- Model: `claude-haiku-4-5`\n- Output: `{ title (≤8 words), body (≤50 words) }`\n- Rules: specific not generic, never urgency/FOMO, personalized to trajectory\n\n**Meeting prep (`/meeting-prep`):**\n- Input: studentId + counselorId → fetch ONLY privacy-shared data\n- Model: `claude-haiku-4-5`\n- Output: ≤300 word summary with 2-3 conversation starters and flags\n- Rules: synthesized not raw, professional+warm tone\n\n#### Step 11: Embedding Pipeline\n- On `Activity` create: generate Voyage AI embedding → store in `map_nodes`-parallel index\n- On `SignalProfile` update: generate embedding of `compressedSummary` → store for map personalization\n- Use `voyage-3` model (1024-dim vectors)\n- Batch embed on first synthesis; incremental thereafter\n\n---\n\n### PHASE 4 — Student Web App (Steps 12–15)\n\n#### Step 12: App Shell & Routing\n**`apps/web/app/`:**\n```\n(auth)/\n  sign-in/page.tsx          Clerk SignIn component\n  sign-up/page.tsx          Clerk SignUp component\n(student)/\n  layout.tsx                BottomNav (Home/Map/Reflections/Profile)\n  page.tsx                  Home dashboard\n  reflect/\n    page.tsx                Start/continue session CTA\n    [sessionId]/\n      page.tsx              5-step session wizard\n      complete/page.tsx     Completion screen\n  map/page.tsx              Interactive D3 map\n  reflections/page.tsx      History timeline\n  profile/page.tsx          Signal profile + privacy + settings\n  onboarding/page.tsx       First-time onboarding wizard\n(counselor)/\n  layout.tsx                Sidebar nav\n  dashboard/page.tsx        Student grid overview\n  students/[id]/page.tsx    Student detail + meeting prep\n  flags/page.tsx            Students needing attention\n```\n\n#### Step 13: Home Dashboard\n**`app/(student)/page.tsx`** — glass cards showing:\n- Current signal profile summary (top 3-5 interest clusters with trend indicators)\n- Next session countdown (\"Your monthly reflection opens in X days\")\n- Recent notifications (last 2)\n- Exploration breadth score bar\n- Map moment CTA (\"3 new areas match your profile\")\n\nComponents:\n- `SignalSummary.tsx` — interest clusters with signal strength indicators\n- `BreadthBar.tsx` — animated progress bar 0-100\n- `SessionCountdown.tsx` — days to next monthly session\n- `NotificationPreview.tsx` — 2-card notification strip\n\n#### Step 14: Monthly Reflection Session Wizard\n**`app/(student)/reflect/[sessionId]/page.tsx`** — 5-step wizard:\n\n**Step 1 — Pulse Check:**\n- 1-10 energy slider (not a mood tracker — context setter)\n- Optional free text: \"What's on your mind?\"\n- Large, comfortable input, no judgment framing\n\n**Step 2 — Activity Logger:**\n- List existing activities (ongoing)\n- \"Add Activity\" form: name, category selector, excitement rating (1-5 stars), hours/week\n- Smart suggestions based on prior entries\n- \"Continue to Reflection\" CTA\n\n**Step 3 — AI Reflection Prompts:**\n- Fetch prompts from `/api/ai/reflection-prompts` (calls AI service)\n- Display 2-3 questions one at a time or stacked\n- Large textarea per question, auto-save every 10 seconds\n- Word count indicator\n- No character limit\n\n**Step 4 — Map Moment:**\n- Show 1-2 \"did you know?\" map expansions based on this session's activities\n- Cards showing a career/major/opportunity adjacent to their signals\n- \"Add to my map\" bookmarking\n- Optional \"skip\" if student just wants to submit\n\n**Step 5 — Privacy Review:**\n- Checklist of signal data categories (toggles default ON)\n- Per-reflection sharing (default OFF)\n- \"What your counselor will see\" live preview\n- \"Submit Reflection\" CTA\n- Triggers `/api/sessions/[id]/submit`\n\n#### Step 15: The Map (D3.js)\n**`app/(student)/map/page.tsx`** + **`components/map/MapCanvas.tsx`:**\n\n```\nMapCanvas.tsx\n├── D3ForceGraph (nodes as circles, edges as lines)\n├── Node rendering:\n│   ├── Size = relevance to student (similarity score)\n│   ├── Glow effect = personalized (CSS radial-gradient)\n│   ├── Color = node type (career=blue, major=purple, industry=green, program=amber)\n│   └── Pulse animation = newly relevant nodes\n├── MapNodeDetail.tsx (glass panel on node click)\n├── MapSearchBar.tsx (text search, filters by type)\n├── MapLegend.tsx (type color key)\n└── PersonalizationToggle.tsx (show all vs. personalized view)\n```\n\nD3 force simulation: charge repulsion, link distance by edge weight, center gravity. Pinch-to-zoom, drag-to-pan. Mobile: touch-friendly with larger tap targets.\n\n---\n\n### PHASE 5 — Counselor Dashboard (Step 16)\n\n#### Step 16: Counselor Views\n**`app/(counselor)/dashboard/page.tsx`:**\n- Student grid: name, grade, top 2 interests, breadth score bar, engagement indicator (dot: green/amber/red)\n- Sort by: breadth, engagement, grade, last active\n- Filter by: interest area, engagement level\n- \"Needs attention\" flag indicators\n\n**`app/(counselor)/students/[id]/page.tsx`:**\n- Synthesized interest profile (never raw text)\n- Trajectory visualization (shift arrows)\n- Suggested conversation starters (AI-generated)\n- Engagement timeline\n- \"Send Reflection Prompt\" — counselor can send a custom prompt to student\n- Meeting prep PDF/print view\n\n---\n\n### PHASE 6 — Notification System (Step 17)\n\n#### Step 17: QStash Scheduling Engine\n**`apps/web/app/api/webhooks/qstash/route.ts`** — receives jobs:\n\n**Job types:**\n- `WEEKLY_NUDGE_SWEEP` — runs every Monday 9am\n  - For each active student: check days since last reflection, generate nudge if eligible\n  - Respect: maxPerWeek cap, 48hr minimum interval, quiet hours, cooldown after session (72hr)\n- `OPPORTUNITY_SWEEP` — runs nightly\n  - Match upcoming opportunities (deadlines within 3 weeks) against student signal embeddings\n- `POST_SESSION_SYNTHESIS` — triggered on session submit\n  - Call AI service `/synthesize-profile`\n  - Update SignalProfile in DB\n  - Invalidate Redis caches\n\n**Scheduling:** Register QStash cron jobs on deploy via `scripts/register-crons.ts`\n\n**Notification delivery:**\n- Web: store in `notifications` table → poll on home page\n- Mobile (Phase 2): Expo Push Notifications via `expo-server-sdk`\n\n---\n\n### PHASE 7 — Mobile App (Step 18)\n\n#### Step 18: Expo App\n**`apps/mobile/`:**\n```\napp/\n  (tabs)/\n    index.tsx         Home (mirrors web home)\n    map.tsx           Simplified map (WebView of web map or native D3)\n    reflections.tsx   Session history\n    profile.tsx       Signal profile + settings\n  reflect/\n    [sessionId].tsx   Full 5-step session (native UI)\n  onboarding.tsx      First launch flow\ncomponents/\n  GlassCard.tsx       Native glass (BlurView)\n  SignalBadge.tsx\n  ActivityCard.tsx\n  NotificationCard.tsx\nlib/\n  api.ts              API client pointing to Vercel URL\n  notifications.ts    Expo push notification registration\n```\n\nKey mobile differences:\n- `expo-blur` for glass effect (iOS) / fallback for Android\n- `expo-notifications` for push registration + handling\n- Bottom tab navigator (4 tabs)\n- Haptic feedback on key interactions (`expo-haptics`)\n\n---\n\n### PHASE 8 — Data Seeding (Step 19)\n\n#### Step 19: Map Data Population\n**`packages/db/src/seed.ts`** — seed script with initial map data:\n\nCareer families (13 total from PDR): Technology, Finance, Consulting, Healthcare, Engineering, Law, Education, Media, Government/Policy, Science/Research, Arts/Design, Entrepreneurship, Nonprofit\n\nPer family: 5-15 specific career nodes with:\n- `metadata.medianSalary`, `metadata.growthRate`\n- `metadata.educationRequired`\n- `metadata.skills[]`, `metadata.entryPaths[]`\n- `metadata.dayInTheLife`\n\nEducation nodes: top 100 US universities' notable programs, double-major combinations, distinctive programs (UVA Systems Engineering, Stanford Symbolic Systems, etc.)\n\nOpportunity nodes: national competitions by field, summer programs, online courses, research opportunities\n\nAfter seeding: run Voyage AI embedding batch job on all map nodes (`scripts/embed-map-nodes.ts`)\n\n---\n\n### PHASE 9 — Testing & Deployment (Step 20)\n\n#### Step 20: Deployment Setup\n**Vercel (web):**\n- Root dir: `apps/web`\n- Build: `turbo build --filter=web`\n- All env vars set in dashboard\n- Clerk webhook → `/api/webhooks/clerk`\n- QStash registered crons\n\n**Railway (ai-service):**\n- Dockerfile deploy\n- Health endpoint: `GET /health`\n- Auto-deploy on push to `main`\n\n**Vercel env vars required:**\n```\nDATABASE_URL, DIRECT_URL\nNEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, CLERK_SECRET_KEY, CLERK_WEBHOOK_SECRET\nAI_SERVICE_URL, AI_SERVICE_SECRET_KEY\nQSTASH_TOKEN, QSTASH_CURRENT_SIGNING_KEY, QSTASH_NEXT_SIGNING_KEY\nUPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL, UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN\nNEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL\n```\n\n**Railway env vars required:**\n```\nANTHROPIC_API_KEY\nDATABASE_URL (non-pooled Supabase URL)\nVOYAGE_API_KEY\nAI_SERVICE_SECRET_KEY\n```\n\n---\n\n## Build Order (Critical Path)\n\n```\nWeek 1:  Step 1-2   → Monorepo scaffold + packages (types, ui, config, db)\nWeek 2:  Step 3     → Database schema → Supabase setup → migrations\nWeek 3:  Step 4     → Auth (Clerk) → webhook → user sync\nWeek 4:  Step 5-6   → Session, reflection, privacy, student profile APIs\nWeek 5:  Step 7-8   → Map API + Counselor API\nWeek 6:  Step 9-10  → AI Service (FastAPI) → all 4 prompt implementations\nWeek 7:  Step 11    → Embedding pipeline (Voyage AI + pgvector)\nWeek 8:  Step 12-13 → Web app shell + Home dashboard\nWeek 9:  Step 14    → Monthly reflection session wizard (core UX)\nWeek 10: Step 15    → The Map (D3.js)\nWeek 11: Step 16    → Counselor dashboard\nWeek 12: Step 17    → Notification system (QStash)\nWeek 13: Step 18    → Mobile app (Expo)\nWeek 14: Step 19    → Map data seeding + embedding batch\nWeek 15: Step 20    → Deployment (Vercel + Railway + Expo)\n```\n\n---\n\n## Key Architectural Decisions\n\n**Why QStash over Bull:** Vercel serverless has no persistent process. QStash delivers jobs as HTTP POST callbacks — the only viable pattern.\n\n**Why compressed profiles:** Full student history = 10k+ tokens at 5 sessions. Monthly synthesis (claude-sonnet, expensive, once/month) compresses to 400-word summary. All other calls use only that summary (claude-haiku, cheap).\n\n**Why RLS + API-layer privacy:** RLS in Supabase is the security guarantee. API filtering is the UX feature. Both needed.\n\n**Why Voyage AI:** Anthropic has no standalone embedding API. Voyage AI (Anthropic partner) provides `voyage-3` (1024-dim, optimized for semantic similarity).\n\n---\n\n## Verification Plan\n1. Auth flow: Sign up as student → Clerk webhook → Student row in Supabase ✓\n2. Session flow: Create session → add activities → get AI prompts → submit → QStash job → SignalProfile updated ✓\n3. Privacy: Counselor sees only opted-in items; raw reflections hidden by default ✓\n4. Map: Personalized query returns nodes ranked by vector similarity ✓\n5. Notifications: Weekly sweep respects frequency caps, quiet hours, 72hr post-session cooldown ✓\n6. Counselor dashboard: Shows synthesized (not raw) data, filtered by privacy settings ✓\n"}

Primary Request and Intent:\n   The user requested full implementation of the COMPASS application — a longitudinal student operating system for high school self-authorship — from scratch, based on a detailed 20-step PDR plan. The implementation spans a Turborepo monorepo with: a Next.js 14 web app (student portal + counselor dashboard), a Python FastAPI AI service, an Expo React Native mobile app, Supabase/Prisma database, Clerk auth, Upstash QStash/Redis queue/cache, Voyage AI embeddings, Anthropic Claude AI, and D3.js map visualization. After a mid-session question (\"how do I test everything so far?\" — answered with a testing guide), the user then said \"continue implementing the rest of the files.\"\n\n2. Key Technical Concepts:\n   - **Monorepo**: Turborepo + pnpm workspaces with packages: `@compass/types`, `@compass/ui`, `@compass/db`, `@compass/config`\n   - **Auth**: Clerk with `clerkMiddleware`, svix webhook verification, user sync to Supabase on `user.created`/`user.updated`/`user.deleted`\n   - **Database**: Prisma + Supabase PostgreSQL with `pgvector` extension (1024-dim embeddings), full schema with cascade deletes\n   - **AI Service**: Python FastAPI with `claude-haiku-4-5` (prompts/notifications) and `claude-sonnet-4-6` (synthesis), Voyage AI `voyage-3` embeddings\n   - **Signal Profile**: Monthly synthesis compresses full history to ~400-word summary; all other AI calls use only that summary (cheap haiku calls)\n   - **Queue**: Upstash QStash for serverless-safe background jobs (`POST_SESSION_SYNTHESIS`, `WEEKLY_NUDGE_SWEEP`, `OPPORTUNITY_SWEEP`)\n   - **Privacy**: Dual-layer — RLS (Supabase) for security, API filtering for UX; reflections default private, signal data toggleable per category\n   - **Map**: D3 force simulation with pgvector similarity search (`embedding <-> $1::vector`) for personalization; Upstash Redis 1hr cache\n   - **Glass design system**: `backdrop-blur-[20px] backdrop-saturate-[180%]`, `bg-white/[0.72]`, `border-white/[0.18]`, Framer Motion animations\n   - **Mobile**: Expo Router with `expo-blur` (iOS glass), `expo-notifications` push, Clerk token stored in `expo-secure-store`\n\n3. Files and Code Sections:\n\n   **Monorepo Root**\n   - `/compass/package.json` — workspace config with turbo scripts\n   - `/compass/pnpm-workspace.yaml` — `apps/*` and `packages/*` globs\n   - `/compass/turbo.json` — pipeline: build, dev, lint, test, db:generate, db:migrate\n   - `/compass/.env.example` — all required env vars documented (DATABASE_URL, DIRECT_URL, Clerk, AI service, QStash, Redis, Voyage)\n   - `/compass/.gitignore`\n\n   **packages/config**\n   - `package.json`, `tsconfig.base.json` — ES2022, bundler moduleResolution, strict\n   - `api/sessions/route.ts` — POST (upsert by studentId+monthKey), GET list\n   - `api/sessions/[id]/route.ts` — GET detail with activities+reflections, PATCH pulseScore/pulseNote\n   - `api/sessions/[id]/submit/route.ts` — POST marks completedAt, enqueues QStash `POST_SESSION_SYNTHESIS` with 30s delay\n   - `api/sessions/prompts/route.ts` — POST fetches signal profile + recent data, calls AI service, returns 2-3 personalized prompts with hardcoded fallback\n   - `api/activities/route.ts` / `[id]/route.ts` — CRUD with session ownership validation\n   - `api/reflections/route.ts` / `[id]/route.ts` — create/update, word count calculation\n   - `api/privacy/route.ts` — GET/PUT privacy settings\n   - `api/privacy/reset/route.ts` — POST makes everything private + clears all reflection sharing\n   - `api/privacy/audit/route.ts` — GET returns sharing history\n   - `api/students/profile/route.ts` — GET own profile, PUT update name/grade\n   - `api/students/signal-profile/route.ts` — GET latest SignalProfile with Redis 1hr cache\n   - `api/students/onboarding/route.ts` — POST saves gradeLevel + initial activities, sets onboardingCompleted=true\n   - `api/export/route.ts` — GET full data export as JSON download\n   - `api/export/delete/route.ts` — DELETE GDPR account deletion + Redis cache invalidation\n   - `api/map/nodes/route.ts` — GET all nodes filterable by type/parentId\n   - `api/map/nodes/[id]/route.ts` — GET node detail with outEdges, inEdges, children\n   - `api/map/personalized/route.ts` — GET: fetches compressedSummary → calls AI service /embed → pgvector `ORDER BY embedding <-> $1::vector LIMIT 50` → injects similarity scores → Redis 1hr cache; falls back to all nodes\n   - `api/map/search/route.ts` — GET ?q= text search on label/description\n   - `api/counselor/students/route.ts` — GET school students with privacy-filtered breadthScore, topInterests, engagement status\n   - `api/counselor/students/[id]/summary/route.ts` — GET privacy-filtered synthesized view\n   - `api/counselor/students/[id]/meeting-prep/route.ts` — GET AI meeting prep with 24hr Redis cache\n   - `api/counselor/flags/route.ts` — GET students with never_onboarded/never_reflected/disengaged/narrow_interests flags\n   - `api/notifications/route.ts` — GET paginated list\n   - `api/notifications/[id]/read/route.ts` / `acted/route.ts` — PUT mark read/acted\n   - `api/notifications/preferences/route.ts` — GET/PUT preferences\n   - `api/webhooks/qstash/route.ts` — `verifySignatureAppRouter` handler for POST_SESSION_SYNTHESIS (calls AI synthesize → saves SignalProfile → invalidates Redis), WEEKLY_NUDGE_SWEEP (checks 48hr cooldown, 72hr post-session cooldown, weekly cap, quiet hours), OPPORTUNITY_SWEEP (7-day cooldown per student)\n\n   **apps/web — Pages**\n   -
